supplier_id.description: Supplier to create the purchase order for

purchase_order_status_id.description: Initial status for the purchase order

delivery_location_id.description: Location within the warehouse for delivery

order_number.description: Custom order number (auto-generated if not provided)

expected_delivery_days.description: Expected number of days until delivery

notes.description: Additional notes for the purchase order

source_from_event.description: Whether to source line items from the triggering event data

default_line_item_status_id.description: Default status for auto-created line items

line_items.description: Line items to include in the purchase order

unit_cost.description: Unit cost as a decimal string (e.g. "25.50") or number; string form preferred

discount.description: Discount fraction as a decimal string (e.g. "0.10" for 10%) or number; string form preferred
